purpose: Reference inventory for the style-docs collapse (phase 4). Answers: what does each style doc contain, who links to it, what would break if we moved or merged it. Built before any collapse edits per the 'Inventory Before Edit' invariant.

targetEndState.rationale: Invariant quick-refs and full guides duplicate normative content and drift over time. Collapse the pairs into single canonical guides, put a 'read first' matrix in README.md, and keep specialized guides only where they stand alone.
